zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke於1425年出生在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾格亞特 斯陶頓時，她的父親Sir Richard Dunstroke26歲，母親Lady Anne Bell20歲。她於1465年與Sir William Roger Walton在英國亨廷格多史爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1525年在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾享年100歲。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke was born in 1425, in Great Staughton, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Dunstroke, was 26 and her mother, Lady Anne Bell, was 20. She married Sir William Roger Walton in 1465, in Huntingdonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1525, in Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 100.

Elle a épousé Sir William Roger Walton en 1465, à Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1525, à Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 100 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Dunstrokeが1425年にイギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアグレアト スタウトンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Dunstrokeは26歳，母Lady Anne Bellは20歳であった。1465年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアでSir William Roger Waltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1525年にイギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアで100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Dunstroke(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 그리트 스타그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Dunstroke(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Bell(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 헌틴그도실르에서 Sir William Roger Walton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.
